title: GooseMod
description: A mod that adds several random features in different areas of the game
body: GooseMod enhances your gaming experience with exciting new features! Discover the rare Armonite ore and craft powerful gear to boost your adventures. Equip unique rings that grant special abilities and choose from diverse classes that influence weapon performance when paired with special helmets. Unleash the power of new staffs for active skills, wield swords with unique traits, encounter new mobs, and face the formidable Ice Titan boss. Elevate your gameplay with GooseMod!
